site_variant.name: Localizacao como prova de confiança / Industrial bold

rules: Use only official/licensed brand logo files supplied for the project or downloaded from allowed official brand/press assets.
Do not generate fake vehicle brand logos with AI.
Keep generated workshop photos logo-free; brand logos belong in the brands UI strip.
Preferred format is SVG. Accepted formats are SVG, PNG and WebP.

street_context.address: R. Prof. Ulisses Vieira, 1462 - Santa Quiteria, Curitiba - PR, 80310-120
rules: Do not publish Google Street View screenshots as site assets.
Do not recreate exact people, plates, private details or storefront copy.

instructions: Generate these images inside Codex using the image generation tool.
Do not use nighttime, rainy, wet-asphalt or roadside-emergency imagery unless explicitly approved for this lead.
Do not repeat the same generated character across multiple assets in the same site.
Generated photos should use brand-compatible vehicle silhouettes but must avoid fake logos, badges, emblems and readable model marks.

Official car brand logos are separate UI assets in assets/brand-logos and may be used only when supplied/licensed or sourced from an allowed official brand/press kit. Record the source in the lead notes.

Street View context may guide local atmosphere, street scale and surroundings, but do not copy Google Street View imagery or recreate exact people, license plates, storefront details or private information.
Do not put text, license plates or watermarks inside generated images.
Copy each generated image into the listed file path, converting to WebP when needed.
The website is not ready to publish until every required image exists.

hero-mobile.prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: mobile landing page hero image for a Brazilian auto repair shop
Required output dimensions: 1536x2048, vertical 3:4
Primary request: create a premium vertical advertising photograph for a local auto repair shop in Curitiba, Brazil, serving popular vehicles
Vehicle mix: popular Brazilian compact hatchbacks, sedans and small SUVs used daily in Curitiba, brand-accurate silhouettes; logo-free, brand-compatible vehicle silhouettes matching served brands: Fiat, Chevrolet, Volkswagen, Renault, Hyundai, Toyota, Honda, Nissan. Official brand logos are handled as separate website UI assets, not inside this generated photo. Do not invent or show brand logos, badges, emblems or readable model marks
Regional context: Curitiba, Brazil regional context: Linha Verde, Batel, Agua Verde, Portao, Boqueirao, Reboucas, Sao Jose dos Pinhais, Colombo, Araucaria and Pinhais; subtle urban details, araucaria trees, tiled sidewalks, industrial streets and realistic local workshop surroundings; Prospect address context: R. Prof. Ulisses Vieira, 1462 - Santa Quiteria, Curitiba - PR, 80310-120; use plausible local street surroundings for this Curitiba/RMC address; daytime only, dry streets, no rain, no wet asphalt, no night scene
Scene/backdrop: clean, organized mechanical workshop near a Curitiba/RMC urban street, tires, tool cabinets, car lift, diagnostic equipment and realistic local workshop details
Subject: fictional professional mechanic or service advisor, confident and trustworthy, looking at the camera; use a unique face, outfit and pose for this asset, not repeated in other site images
Style/medium: photorealistic editorial advertising photography
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 mobile-first hero crop, subject clear in the center-right, background cinematic, usable dark negative space for website headline overlay, keep faces/hands/vehicle details inside the central 82% safe area, no important detail on the outer crop edges
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight or clean bright overcast, modern, competent and trustworthy; dry floor and dry street only
Color palette: use the prospect brand palette subtly in wardrobe accents and workshop details: primary #0F4C81, secondary #D7261E, accent #F4C430
Text: no text
Constraints: realistic Brazilian workshop, no fake business signage, no license plates, no watermark
Avoid: night, rain, wet asphalt, emergency roadside mood, fake-looking hands, distorted tools, unreadable labels, extra fingers, repeated character, generic stock-photo smile
Lead-specific Fable 5 art direction: Mecânico de meia-idade sorrindo ao lado de carro popular em elevador, luz de dia clara e seca, oficina limpa, enquadramento vertical com espaço superior para texto, sem placas ou logos.

og-image.prompt:
Create a premium advertising image for a local Brazilian auto repair shop website preview in Curitiba/RMC. Required output dimensions: 1200x630, social preview ratio 1.91:1. Show a clean mechanical workshop with popular Brazilian compact hatchbacks, sedans and small SUVs used daily in Curitiba, brand-accurate silhouettes being inspected, tires and tools in the background, warm daylight, high trust, modern service quality. Use logo-free, brand-compatible vehicle silhouettes matching Fiat, Chevrolet, Volkswagen, Renault, Hyundai, Toyota, Honda, Nissan; official brand logos are separate website UI assets, not part of this generated image. Regional context: Curitiba, Brazil regional context: Linha Verde, Batel, Agua Verde, Portao, Boqueirao, Reboucas, Sao Jose dos Pinhais, Colombo, Araucaria and Pinhais; subtle urban details, araucaria trees, tiled sidewalks, industrial streets and realistic local workshop surroundings; Prospect address context: R. Prof. Ulisses Vieira, 1462 - Santa Quiteria, Curitiba - PR, 80310-120; use plausible local street surroundings for this Curitiba/RMC address; daytime only, dry streets, no rain, no wet asphalt, no night scene. Composition must work as a WhatsApp link preview thumbnail with the subject centered and no important detail near the edges. Use subtle brand accents: #0F4C81, #D7261E, #F4C430. No text, no watermark, no license plates, no visible vehicle logos, no badges. Avoid night, rain, wet asphalt and repeated characters.
